title: How Lashkar Terrorist Directed Pahalgam Terror Attack From Pakistan: NIA Chargesheet
description: Saifullah alias Sajid Jatt alias 'Langda', a terrorist of the Lashkar-e-Taiba (LeT) and its proxy The Resistance Front (TRF), operated from Pakistan's Lahore and gave instructions to the terrorists in Pahalgam, the NIA chargesheet said
